overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime exploration of a neon-lit urban plaza. The player moves from an outdoor seating area past a food vendor, through a graffiti-covered lower level, and up to an elevated covered walkway with vibrant red neon lighting.

events.description: begins walking around the table, moving toward the food stall

agents.ego_description: circling around the metal table and approaching the food vendor stall

notable_agents.action: sitting at the round table wearing a wide-brimmed hat and jacket

tall metal stools surrounding the round table

food preparation counter with equipment and steam vents
artificial tree-like structure with illuminated branches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban plaza with a round metal table and stools in the foreground. A seated NPC wearing a hat sits at the table while the camera moves around them. In the background, a food stall with green neon lighting and tall futuristic buildings with illuminated signs are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall with preparation counter

events.description: moves under the food stall canopy, passing the preparation counter
encounters a pedestrian walking away in the lower plaza area

agents.ego_description: passing by the food stall counter and entering the lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera toward the back of the plaza

entered.detail: white bar stools lined up at the food counter
steam rising from cooking equipment on the counter
open concrete paved area with scattered litter
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags
concrete staircase leading up to the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the green-lit food stall canopy, passing the preparation counter with bar stools. The scene transitions to a lower concrete plaza with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. A lone pedestrian is seen walking away in the distance as the camera approaches a concrete staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower plaza with graffiti walls and stairway

events.description: begins ascending the concrete staircase to the upper level
reaches the top of the stairs and enters the covered upper walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the littered lower plaza and climbing the concrete stairs

entered.detail: metal safety railings along the staircase and walkway
elevated walkway bridge with metal truss structure
bright red neon tube lighting illuminating the upper area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the empty lower plaza with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris, approaching a concrete staircase. The camera ascends the stairs, passing metal railings, and emerges at the top where red neon lights become visible from the upper covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered dining area with neon lighting

events.description: encounters seated patrons in the neon-lit dining area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered seating area with red neon lighting

notable_agents.action: sitting at a table in the covered dining area

entered.detail: metal and glass roof structure covering the walkway
red plastic chairs arranged around tables
dark wooden tables with items on them
metal diamond-plate flooring with red reflections
doorway leading into the interior building

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an elevated covered walkway illuminated by vibrant red neon lights. The area contains plastic chairs and tables arranged for dining, with metal grate flooring reflecting the red glow. A few NPCs are seated at tables, and a building entrance is visible at the far end as the camera moves through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit urban plaza down into a gritty underpass before ascending to a vibrant red-lit elevated walkway. It begins by circling a seated figure at a metal table, with a green-lit food stall and towering futuristic buildings framing the background. As the camera glides under the food stall's canopy and past its preparation counter, the environment shifts downward into a lower concrete plaza characterized by graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. The camera then navigates this desolate space toward a concrete staircase, ascending past metal railings as the dim surroundings give way to a burgeoning red glow. Finally, the scene opens into an elevated covered walkway where vibrant red neon lights reflect off metal grate flooring and illuminate dining areas with plastic chairs and tables.
